allow: Bash(# Check the .env.example for any sensitive content indicators cat ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/.env.example"")

Bash(# Check if vfsstream is used by the application \(it''s a testing library for PHP\) grep -rl ""vfsstream\\|vfsStream\\|bovigo/vfs"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application"")
Bash(# Check for any .env file \(not .env.example\) in the root find ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile"" -name "".env"" -not -name "".env.example"")
Bash(# Check if admin_assets/build is referenced in any views or CSS grep -rl ""admin_assets/build"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application"")
Bash(# Verify flot-old is truly an old duplicate \(both flot and flot-old exist\) ls ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/admin_assets/plugins/flot/"")
Bash(# Check for any files that reference flot-old in application JS/views grep -rl ""flot-old"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application"")

Bash(# Confirm right_sidebar.php is truly empty and safe to delete wc -c ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application/modules/template/views/admin_include/right_sidebar.php"" # Check if it''s referenced grep -rl ""right_sidebar"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application"")

Bash(# Check if any part of the application references the admin_assets/data/outgoing path grep -rl ""data/outgoing\\|outgoing/backup"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application"")
Bash(# Check if correcoes_acentos.sql is referenced anywhere grep -rl ""correcoes_acentos"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile"")
Bash(# Final check: any other junk files I might have missed find ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile"" -name ""*.orig"" -o -name ""*.rej"")

Bash(# Check if var_dump in Account.php and Inventory_model.php are actually active code or in comments grep -n -B 3 -A 1 ""var_dump"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application/modules/accounts/controllers/Account.php"")

Bash(# Check if Account.php get_customers function is used/live or orphaned grep -n ""get_customers\\|function get_customers"" ""g:/Projetos/inventro-inventory-management-system/inventro-main/inventro_mainfile/application/modules/accounts/controllers/Account.php"")
